description:
The `plugins` prop passed to the `<Markdown>` molecule is constructed inline, creating a new array reference on every render. Any renderer keying off prop identity (Tiptap extensions, remark/rehype plugin chains) fully unmounts and remounts on each token, producing visible flicker.

**Fix:** Replace all inline plugin array constructions with module-level constants or `useMemo(() => [...], [])`. Verify no plugin array is reconstructed as a side effect of a state update during streaming.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/ui/src/molecules/Markdown/Markdown.tsx` — document stability contract in JSDoc
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx` — fix inline plugins prop
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/StreamingMessage.tsx` — fix inline plugins prop if present
- `apps/ava/src/hooks/useMarkdownPlugins.ts` — create if no stable plugin hook exists

**Acceptance criteria:**
- React DevTools Profiler shows 0 `<Markdown>` unmount/remount events during a streamed message of ≥100 tokens
- Unit test: 10 token appends via Zustand store → Markdown component never unmounts
- Build passes, all existing tests pass

**Complexity:** small
title: Fix plugin array remount bug in Markdown renderer

descriptionHistory.description:
The `plugins` prop passed to the `<Markdown>` molecule is constructed inline, creating a new array reference on every render. Any renderer keying off prop identity (Tiptap extensions, remark/rehype plugin chains) fully unmounts and remounts on each token, producing visible flicker.

**Fix:** Replace all inline plugin array constructions with module-level constants or `useMemo(() => [...], [])`. Verify no plugin array is reconstructed as a side effect of a state update during streaming.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/ui/src/molecules/Markdown/Markdown.tsx` — document stability contract in JSDoc
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx` — fix inline plugins prop
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/StreamingMessage.tsx` — fix inline plugins prop if present
- `apps/ava/src/hooks/useMarkdownPlugins.ts` — create if no stable plugin hook exists

**Acceptance criteria:**
- React DevTools Profiler shows 0 `<Markdown>` unmount/remount events during a streamed message of ≥100 tokens
- Unit test: 10 token appends via Zustand store → Markdown component never unmounts
- Build passes, all existing tests pass

**Complexity:** small
